message:
feat: Implement more TODO stubs with real functionality

- mapping.zig: Call PyErr_Clear when key not found (expected behavior)
- moduleobject.zig: Validate PYTHON_API_VERSION (1013 for 3.12)
- abstract.zig: Delegate PyObject_ASCII to full implementation
- connection.zig: Check thread ID using std.Thread.getCurrentId()

Reduces TODO count from 18 to 15 (3 eliminated in c_interop/src).
